channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ACT Government Corruption: Union Favoritism Leads to Higher Taxpayer Costs
item.description: The Integrity Commission report has exposed systemic corruption within the ACT government, revealing how union influence skewed public contracts to benefit favoured companies. Two officials, Katy Hair...

item.title: How Liberal Preferences Could Influence Victoria's State Election Outcome
item.description: Antony Green's analysis explores whether the Victorian Liberals' strategic preference distribution in the 2010 election, which favored Labor over the Greens, played a decisive role in securing their v...

item.title: MLS Probes Inter Miami's Casemiro Transfer Allegations
item.description: Major League Soccer (MLS) has launched an investigation into allegations of tampering involving Inter Miami after the club signed Brazilian midfielder Casemiro. The 34-year-old, who previously played ...

item.title: Renowned Montreal pianist Oliver Jones passes away at 91
item.description: The article reports the death of Oliver Jones, a celebrated Montreal-based pianist who died at the age of 91. It highlights his contributions to classical music and his legacy in the local arts commun...

item.title: Addressing Migration Challenges Through Responsible Governance in Africa
item.description: The article explores the multifaceted nature of migration as a global issue, emphasizing the need for responsible governance across Africa. It highlights recent incidents such as anti-migrant protests...

item.title: Wildfire in British Columbia Sparks Evacuations and Evacuation Alerts
item.description: A wildfire near Brunswick Creek in British Columbia has intensified, prompting further evacuations and raising concerns about the region's safety. The blaze, which has already displaced residents and ...

item.title: Tanzania diversifies financing by listing shilling bond on London Stock Exchange
item.description: Tanzania is set to list its first shilling-denominated offshore bond on the London Stock Exchange (LSE), a move aimed at diversifying financing for development projects and accessing international cap...

item.title: Protests Against Education System Irregularities and Police Clashes in Delhi
item.description: The article details ongoing protests in Delhi against alleged irregularities in the education system, including competitive exam paper leaks. Students and activists are demanding accountability for th...

item.title: Haydee Garcia's RTW Collection and Puma's Tacklette Shoes Highlight Latest Fashion Trends
item.description: The article discusses recent developments in the fashion industry, focusing on two key highlights: Haydee Garcia's ready-to-wear (RTW) collection and Puma's new Tacklette shoes. Haydee Garcia, a renow...

item.title: Researchers Warn Millions of Cars Are Vulnerable to Bluetooth Hacking via KARR Devices
item.description: A study by UCSD researchers has revealed a critical security flaw in the KARR alarm system, which is installed in over 2 million vehicles. The KARR device, designed for car alarms, uses Bluetooth sign...

item.title: PHLPost Simplifies Postal ID Application Process
item.description: The Philippine Postal Corporation (PHLPost) has streamlined the process for obtaining a postal ID, eliminating the need for applicants to present a valid government-issued ID. First-time applicants ar...

item.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia strengthen regional security ties amid Houthi threats
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif condemned Houthi attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea during a telephone conversation with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, emphasizing that such actions vi...

item.title: Tanzania Evaluates Commonwealth's Deadline on Detentions and Talks as CHADEMA Demands Mediator for Negotiations
item.description: Tanzania's government is reviewing the Commonwealth's demands regarding the detention of opposition leader Tundu Lissu, digital access restoration, and inter-party dialogue. CHADEMA, the ruling party,...

item.title: Former police officer's 14-year sexual abuse of women exposed
item.description: A senior police officer in Scotland, PC Alan Greer, has been revealed as a violent rapist who sexually assaulted and attempted to murder multiple women over a 14-year period. The BBC reports that Gree...

item.title: Home Affairs investigates 15 religious leaders over visa fraud allegations
item.description: The South African Department of Home Affairs has confirmed investigations into 15 religious leaders, including pastors and prophets, over allegations of obtaining immigration benefits through fraudule...

item.title: NHS in England to provide MS drug to improve walking for patients
item.description: The NHS in England has approved the use of Fampridine, a drug that aids individuals with multiple sclerosis (MS) in improving their mobility. This medication works by enhancing nerve signals, enabling...

item.title: 2026 Census: Key Details and Participation Guide
item.description: The Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) is conducting the 2026 Census on Tuesday, 11 August, requiring every person in Australia—including residents of Norfolk Island, the Cocos (Keeling) Islands, a...

item.title: Sharon Otieno Murder Trial Concludes as Ex-Governor Awaits Verdict
item.description: The High Court in Nairobi delivered its verdict in the murder case of Sharon Otieno, a former Rongo University student who was killed in 2018. The case, which has spanned nearly eight years, involves ...

item.title: Thalapathy Vijay's 'Jana Nayagan' achieves historic 1 million pre-sale mark in Tamil cinema
item.description: The release of 'Jana Nayagan', starring Thalapathy Vijay, has set a new benchmark in Indian cinema by surpassing 1 million pre-sale tickets. This milestone marks the first time an actor has achieved s...

item.title: Majembe and Partner's Journey from Humble Beginnings to Success
item.description: Majembe, a Kenyan celebrity, shared a heartfelt series of photos on Instagram showcasing his journey with his partner, highlighting their growth from humble beginnings in an iron sheet house to their ...
